title: python-cryptography bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[36.0.1-5]
- Fix CVE-2023-49083: NULL-dereference when loading PKCS7 certificates,
  resolves RHEL-19830
full_text:
